group_runs.title: Tuesday Night Intervals
group_runs.address: Ferry Field, Palmer Park, Argo Loop, B2B Trail, the Arb + more

group_runs.title: Saturday Morning Group Run
group_runs.distance: longer workouts on marked course · beginner + fast groups

events.title: Ann Arbor Civic Band — Oh, The Places You'll Go
events.description: Free outdoor concert by the Ann Arbor Civic Band at Burns Park. Dr. Seuss-themed musical journey program. 7:30–8:30pm.

events.title: Blue Llama Jazz Club — Live Jazz
events.description: Live jazz at the Blue Llama Jazz Club, 314 S Main St. Wednesday jazz runs 7–10:15pm.

events.title: Summer Sounds at the Ann Arbor Art Fair — Schmaltz & Jill Jack
events.description: Free outdoor Summer Sounds concert at the Ann Arbor Art Fair, The Stage on Main (353 S Main St) — modern klezmer from Schmaltz and dynamic folk rock from Jill Jack.

events.title: Ann Arbor Art Fair
events.description: One of the nation's largest juried art fairs — nearly 1,000 artists across 30 city blocks. Three simultaneously running fairs: Street Art Fair, Summer Art Fair, State Street Art Fair. Thu Jul 16 10am–9pm, Fri Jul 17 10am–9pm.

events.title: Ann Arbor Art Fair — Day 2
events.description: Second day of the Ann Arbor Art Fair, and the final day within Amy's Ann Arbor stay. 10am–9pm.

events.title: Summer Sounds at the Ann Arbor Art Fair — The Rupple Brothers & Bobby Alu
events.description: Free outdoor Summer Sounds concert at the Ann Arbor Art Fair featuring psychedelic folk ensemble The Rupple Brothers and tropical ambassador Bobby Alu.

events.title: Pontiac Trail Blazers — Bluegrass Friday
events.description: The Pontiac Trail Blazers perform their regular Bluegrass Friday residency at North Star Lounge with special guest Sequoia Rose. Last night of Amy's Ann Arbor stay.
